    "Inadequate bracing and kickers to withstand lateral concrete pour pressure",
    "High risk of formwork blowout or structural failure during concrete placement"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt the concrete pour preparation immediately",
    "Install additional bracing, kickers, and strongbacks as per engineered formwork design",
    "Obtain sign-off from a qualified inspector or structural engineer before resuming the pour"

  "rationale": "The formwork bracing is inadequate to resist the lateral pressures calculated under ACI 347. Pouring concrete under these conditions poses an immediate safety hazard to workers and a high risk of catastrophic formwork failure.",

  ]
